exploration_notes: The Node.js ESM loader and CJS-ESM interop is implemented across 19 files (16 JS + 3 C++). The entry flow starts at run_main.js where executeUserEntryPoint calls shouldUseESMLoader to detect ESM entry points. The core orchestrator is the ModuleLoader class in esm/loader.js which coordinates: (1) resolution via defaultResolve/moduleResolve/packageResolve in esm/resolve.js, (2) format detection via defaultGetFormat in esm/get_format.js, (3) source loading via defaultLoad/getSource in esm/load.js,
